name: pff_team_grades range year_offset averages grades but sums wins (executed-result parity)
description: Seed team ZZZ with 2024 (grades_offense 60, wins 4) and 2025 (grades_offense 80, wins 12) pff_team_seasonlogs plus an out-of-window 2023 distractor (grades 10, wins 1), then run pff_team_grades_offense AND pff_team_wins together with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. Both columns render through a custom main_select gated by team_year_offset_range_select, so the range path emits a self-contained correlated subquery (the dropped-join alias case). Grades are 0-100 quality scores reduced by AVG (70.00); wins are an additive count reduced by SUM (16). Proves the helper applies the correct per-column reduction across the offset window and excludes the base-year row.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(pff_team_seasonlogs.grades_offense) FROM pff_team_seasonlogs WHERE pff_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND pff_team_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_team_grades_offense_0", (SELECT SUM(pff_team_seasonlogs.wins) FROM pff_team_seasonlogs WHERE pff_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND pff_team_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_team_wins_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-PFF-000911', 'Test', 'Pff', 'T.Pff', 'Test Pff', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 'ZZZ')
INSERT INTO pff_team_seasonlogs (nfl_team, season_year, grades_offense, wins) VALUES ('ZZZ', 2023, 10.00, 1)
INSERT INTO pff_team_seasonlogs (nfl_team, season_year, grades_offense, wins) VALUES ('ZZZ', 2024, 60.00, 4)
INSERT INTO pff_team_seasonlogs (nfl_team, season_year, grades_offense, wins) VALUES ('ZZZ', 2025, 80.00, 12)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(grades_offense) AS pff_team_grades_offense_0, SUM(wins) AS pff_team_wins_0 FROM pff_team_seasonlogs WHERE nfl_team = 'ZZZ' AND season_year IN (2024, 2025)
